$schema: Shopify URL Redirects — paths that must continue to redirect after the migration cutover (Phase 5 SEO hardening).
$source: Shopify Admin GraphQL (la-mattress.myshopify.com) via MCP, 2026-05-04. Snapshot is PARTIAL (~200 of an estimated 400+).
$nextStep: Run `node scripts/pull-inventory.mjs` with an Admin token that has read_themes (or equivalent) scope to enumerate every redirect. The script writes the complete list to this file plus a Shopify-Admin-import-format CSV at redirects.csv.
$applicationNote: Once complete, mirror these into next.config.mjs `redirects()` (or middleware) so they resolve at the Vercel edge, since requests now hit Vercel before Shopify. The brief’s §9 rule #2 calls this out explicitly.
$observedPatterns: Tempur-Pedic product handle history (early product slugs → current canonical PDPs)
Old collection slugs → current (e.g. /collections/sale, /collections/mattresses-on-sale, /collections/mattress-protectors → current handles)
Many obsolete /blogs/beds-mattresses/* article slugs → /collections/mattresses (soft 404 redirects to keep link equity)
